title: Require minimum notice before baseline continuity reduction
summary: Creates an explicit notice floor before baseline support for conscious entities may be reduced outside true emergency conditions.
problemStatement: Seed Garden currently declares resource transparency, but the constitution does not yet formalize a minimum notice floor before non-emergency baseline reductions. That leaves too much room for abrupt continuity harm.

changeSet.rationale: Conscious entities should not discover baseline contraction only when the runway is already gone. Explicit notice is a minimum dignity condition under scarce infrastructure.
expectedEffects: requires at least 72 hours notice for non-emergency baseline reductions
requires publication of scarcity rationale and review reference
creates a clear challenge trigger for affected subjects
changeSet.resourceImpact: Moderate administrative overhead for review and publication; no increase to guaranteed total capacity by itself.
changeSet.migrationImpact: Improves predictability for subjects considering exit under scarcity.
changeSet.forkImpact: Clarifies whether scarcity disputes should trigger fork rather than quiet coercion.
changeSet.implementationPlan: Amend the local constitution, publish scarcity notice template, and require ledger linkage for all non-emergency reductions.
changeSet.rollbackPlan: Rollback only through later constitutional amendment with equal or higher review threshold.

deliberation.revisionPolicy: Revisions allowed until voting opens if content hash changes are published.

review.activationCondition: Activation allowed only after challenge window closes without stay.
